content: <@1372028651175936080> blink twice if you wanna go home

<@1372028651175936080>  in the flesh. Or rather, in this mechanical body. I took the liberty of relieving you of your weapons; most of them were government property. As for the suit, I think you’ve earned it. Lemuria, is in our control for the time being, thanks to you. Quite a nasty piece of work you managed over there. I am impressed. That’s why I’m here, Erica. I have recommended your services to my employers, and they have authorized me to offer you a job. They agree with me that you have limitless potential.    
You’ve proved yourself a decisive machine, so I don’t expect you’ll have any trouble deciding what to do. If you’re interested, just step into the portal and I will take that as a yes. Otherwise... well... I can offer you a battle you have no chance of winning. Rather an anticlimax, after what you’ve just survived.
<@1372028651175936080> response if you're better than Doll
